description_long: This is a classic hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle and a solid, black metal head. The handle is made from a medium-brown wood, showing a natural grain pattern and a gentle ergonomic curve for improved grip and control. The axe head is wedge-shaped with a broad, flat poll and a single sharp cutting edge, finished in matte black. The transition between the handle and the head is seamless, with the wood securely fitted into the eye of the blade. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible decorative elements or branding. This tool is suitable for chopping wood or similar tasks in urban environments such as parks, gardens, or garages.
description: A sturdy hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a matte black metal blade, designed for chopping tasks. The tool has a utilitarian look with a secure handle-to-blade fit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved wooden handle and the broad, black axe head with a visible cutting edge.
description_view_1: End-on view of the handle, displaying its rounded cross-section and the alignment of the handle with the blade.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the handle's curve and the axe head's profile, with the poll and edge visible.
description_view_3: Top-down view showing the width of the axe head and the way the handle is mounted into the blade's eye.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with an oval cross-section, ergonomic grip, and smooth finish.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, wedge-shaped steel blade with a flat poll and no visible beard or decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the wooden handle fitted into the eye of the blade.
